tooltip.toxicsurface.industrial_filter.u: Scrubber for toxic generators — keeps them from venting smog while it lasts.
tooltip.toxicsurface.industrial_filter.c: Generators only (not masks or suits). Clogs after ~15 min of use.
tooltip.toxicsurface.dirty_industrial_fi: Wash it: a fan blowing through water (splashing) → wet industrial filter.
tooltip.toxicsurface.wet_industrial_filt: Dry it with heat: a furnace, or a fan blowing through lava → clean filter.
tooltip.toxicsurface.toxic_residue.fuel: Burns in a Toxic Waste Generator as basic fuel.
tooltip.toxicsurface.toxic_waste_block.f: Premium fuel for a Toxic Waste Generator — burns far longer for more power.
tooltip.toxicsurface.waste_generator.fue: Burns toxic residue or waste blocks to spin a shaft (Create rotation).
tooltip.toxicsurface.sludge_generator.fu: Burns piped-in toxic sludge to spin a shaft (Create rotation).
tooltip.toxicsurface.generator.scrub: Vents toxic smog and hastens the apocalypse unless an Industrial Filter scrubs it.
advancement.toxicsurface.the_air_has_tur: The surface is toxic now. Seal up, filter your air, and find a way to reclaim the world.
